name: A. Chen
text: Excellent work from start to finish. The crew was professional, clean, and finished ahead of schedule. Highly recommend.

name: M. Patel
text: Got quotes from 3 companies. City Roofing was not the cheapest but gave us the most confidence. Zero issues after the job.

name: S. Thompson
text: They handled our insurance claim from the hailstorm perfectly. Roof looks great.

name: L. Wang
text: Replaced our 20-year-old roof in one day. Amazing.
